Professional Summary

Full-stack software developer with over 6 years of experience building cloud-native applications, microservices architectures, and modern solutions using .NET Core, Angular, AWS, and Azure. Proven track record in legacy system modernization, RESTful APIs, cloud platform integration, and engineering best practices including Clean Code, SOLID, and DDD. Focused on writing clean, scalable, and maintainable code in mission-critical enterprise environments.

Professional Experience

Software Developer — Code n'App

Jul 2025 – Jan 2026 | Remote

  • Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps and Git, ensuring continuous and secure delivery
